submittedOn.description: The date and time of the submission. Must conform to the format YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ss.SSSZ

source.description: Specifies the source of data to be returned. If source is not provided, the latest submitted values will be returned.

winterFuelPayment.description: The amount of Winter Fuel Payment received. The value must be either zero or a valid amount for the tax year up to 2 decimal places.
